name: CCM Implementation Guidelines
description: Implementation guidance for CSA CCM controls — explains how to operationalize each CCM control, with implementation examples, references, and validation criteria. Companion document to the CCM controls catalog itself. v2.0 published 2024-05-28.
relationToCloudSecurity: Practical guidance for CSPs implementing CCM controls. Often the difference between 'check the box' and 'actually implement the control'.
relationToAISecurity: CCM covers general cloud security; for AI-specific implementation guidance see AICM and its companion docs.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

current_extraction.notes: Extracted from source PDF via the marker pipeline.

notes: Companion document to CCM. Use alongside CCM v4.x for implementation.
